name: J1939TestWaitForAnyJoinedEvent, J1939TestWaitForAllJoinedEvents
title: J1939TestWaitForAnyJoinedEvent, J1939TestWaitForAllJoinedEvents
description: Waits for the actual set of "joined events". Each of this events can cancel the wait state or the wait condition will be canceled if all "joined events" are signaled. If no event occurred until the time of "timeout" the wait condition will be canceled.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
